title: Multi Miner
description:
An Enchantment that mines 
3x3x3 at once. Supports 1.21x
body:
# ⛏️ Multi Miner - Mine 3×3×3 Areas Instantly!

### 🌟 Transform Your Mining Experience

Tired of breaking blocks one at a time? **Multi Miner** adds a game-changing enchantment that lets you mine **3×3×3 areas** with every swing! Perfect for strip mining, quarrying, and massive excavation projects.

---

## ✨ Key Features

🎯 **Instant Area Mining**
- Break 27 blocks with a single swing
- Works on all pickaxe types (Wood → Netherite)
- Centered on the block you break

🐾 **Smart Controls**
- Hold **Shift** to mine single blocks
- Perfect for precise building and mining

📚 **Easy to Obtain**
- Available from **Enchanting Tables**
- Trade with **Villager Librarians**
- Just like any vanilla enchantment!

🪨 **19 Supported Blocks**
- Stone, Deepslate, Granite, Diorite, Andesite
- All Sandstone variants
- Basalt, Netherrack, End Stone
- And more!

🚫 **No Client Mods Needed**
- Pure vanilla datapack
- Works on multiplayer servers
- No installation required for players

---

## 🎮 How to Use

1. **Get the Enchantment**
   - Enchant pickaxes at an Enchanting Table
   - Trade with Librarian villagers
   - Use `/function multi_miner:give_level1` for testing

2. **Start Mining**
   - Mine any supported block normally
   - Watch the 3×3×3 area break instantly
   - All drops collected automatically

3. **Precision Mode**
   - Hold **Shift** to mine single blocks
   - Perfect for detailed work

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack
2. Place in `.minecraft/saves/[Your World]/datapacks/`
3. Run `/reload` in-game
4. Look for: *"Multi Miner datapack loaded successfully!"*

---

## 🧱 Supported Block Types

| Category | Blocks |
|----------|--------|
| **Stone** | Stone, Deepslate, Dripstone |
| **Granite/Diorite** | Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Tuff |
| **Sandstone** | Sandstone, Red Sandstone, Smooth Sandstone |
| **Basalt** | Basalt, Smooth Basalt, Calcite |
| **Nether** | Netherrack, Crimson/Warped Nylium, Magma, Blackstone |
| **End** | End Stone |

---

## 🎥 Video Showcase

*![3x3x3 = 27 blocks mine at once](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a5e9b96bf6a4053116bb509950d1418a5aa244.gif)*

---

## 📊 Technical Information

- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.11 (Mounts of Mayhem)
- **Pack Format:** 48
- **Enchantment Level:** I (Single Level)
- **Mining Area:** 3×3×3 (27 blocks)
- **Performance:** Highly optimized
- **Compatibility:** Works with all vanilla enchantments

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

**Uninstall Cleanly:**
```mcfunction
/function multi_miner:uninstall
```
Then remove the datapack folder and run `/reload`

**Testing Command:**
```mcfunction
/function multi_miner:give_level1
```

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

✅ **Works With:**
- Fortune enchantment
- Efficiency enchantment
- Mending & Unbreaking
- All vanilla pickaxes
- Multiplayer servers

❌ **Limitations:**
- Only works on pickaxe-mineable stone blocks
- Does not affect ores (for balance)
- Requires the datapack on the server

---

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Suggestions

Found an issue? Have an idea?
- Report bugs in the Issues section
